openQuestions.question: Approve exact labels for the proposed parent-hub ambiguity fixture before freezing it into the 007 ratchet family.
Decide whether any measured overlay conflicts should graduate to live graph-metadata conflicts_with edges.
What exact prompts should populate the cross-hub ambiguity fixture?
openQuestions.nextStep: Author fixtures in a read-only measurement packet before metadata cleanup.

openQuestions.question: What exact top-1/margin deltas appear after deleting deep-loop code-audit metadata and reindexing?
openQuestions.nextEvidence: Run advisor rebuild and 193-row scorer validation in a write-authorized implementation branch.

openQuestions.question: Which command metadata files should be authoritative for derived command bridges?
openQuestions.nextEvidence: Inventory command docs/registries and produce bridge candidates before replacing COMMAND_BRIDGES.

openQuestions.question: Which compiled command-contract fields should become command bridge projection input?
openQuestions.nextStep: Inspect render-command-contract output and define a projection schema.

resolvedQuestions.answer: Do not change semantic_shadow weight in this workstream; pursue mcp-* description/embedding hygiene instead.
Frozen scorer code should retain exact syntax/command anchors; parent-hub vocabulary should move to metadata with cross-hub ownership checks.
Guard coverage must mirror advisor projection buckets, not just graph derived.trigger_phrases.
Layer-1b remains half-landed: deep-loop-workflows metadata still projects code-audit terms and scorer code compensates with codeAuditDeepReviewPenalty.
Metadata cleanup must be an atomic reindex, guard, ratchet, and recapture operation.
Single-pass code audit vocabulary should be owned by sk-code/code-review; deep-loop-workflows should own loop/iteration/convergence review vocabulary only.
conflicts_with should be measured-pair-only, not broad peer-hub taxonomy.

keyFindings.finding: Command bridge projection is hardcoded while executor delegation already demonstrates metadata-derived alias tables.
deep-loop-workflows still projects code-audit/severity review terms that should move to sk-code or become explicitly loop-shaped.
deep-loop-workflows still projects single-pass code-audit vocabulary while fusion.ts carries a compensating penalty.
Existing ambiguity checks are low-margin or synthetic stability checks, not labeled cross-hub ambiguity semantics.

keyFindings.summary: Hardcoded command bridges are a second authority; executor delegation provides a metadata-derived alias-table precedent.
Parent-hub code-audit vocabulary is still projected from deep-loop-workflows and forces a scorer workaround.

keyFindings.finding: Parent-hub compatibility needs a labeled ambiguity slice because existing aggregate accuracy hides contested prompts.
parent-hub-vocab-sync checks derived.trigger_phrases but advisor projection also scores intent_signals and derived keyword fields.
parent-hub-vocab-sync does not validate the full advisor projection surface consumed by explicit/derived lanes.

keyFindings.summary: Projection guard coverage should validate intentSignals, derivedTriggers, and derivedKeywords as consumed by the scorer.
Semantic-shadow false-fires point to mcp-* description hygiene, not lane-weight changes.

keyFindings.finding: semantic_shadow false-fires should first be addressed through description/trigger hygiene, not lane-weight changes.
semantic_shadow should stay frozen; false-fire mitigation belongs in embedding hygiene and abstain fixtures.

keyFindings.summary: The existing vocab sync guard is single-hub; cross-hub normalized phrase collisions need an owner map by hub and intent class.
